question: Who has the highest deposit?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total deposit amount in each branch?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, SUM(d.deposit_amount) AS total_deposit FROM branches b JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY total_deposit DESC;

question: What is the average deposit amount managed by each relationship manager?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT rm.rm_name, AVG(d.deposit_amount) AS avg_deposit FROM relationship_managers rm JOIN customers c ON rm.rm_id = c.rm_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY rm.rm_name ORDER BY avg_deposit DESC;

question: Which customers are managed by Alice Chen?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name FROM customers c JOIN relationship_managers rm ON c.rm_id = rm.rm_id WHERE rm.rm_name = 'Alice Chen' ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;

question: Who are the top 10 customers in Taipei Branch by deposit amount?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id WHERE b.branch_name = 'Taipei Branch' ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC LIMIT 10;
